Class ClassInvariantImpl

java.lang.Object
de.uka.ilkd.key.speclang.ClassInvariantImpl
All Implemented Interfaces:
ClassInvariant, SpecificationElement
public final class ClassInvariantImpl extends Object implements ClassInvariant
Standard implementation of the ClassInvariant interface.

  • Constructor Summary

    Constructors
    Constructor
    Description
    ClassInvariantImpl(String name, String displayName, KeYJavaType kjt, VisibilityModifier visibility, JTerm inv, LocationVariable selfVar)
    Creates a class invariant.
    ClassInvariantImpl(String name, String displayName, KeYJavaType kjt, VisibilityModifier visibility, JTerm inv, LocationVariable selfVar, boolean free)
    Creates a class invariant.

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    String
    getDisplayName()
    Returns the displayed name.
    JTerm
    getInv(JAbstractSortedOperator selfVar, TermServices services)
    Returns the invariant formula without implicit all-quantification over the receiver object.
    KeYJavaType
    getKJT()
    Returns the KeYJavaType representing the class/interface to which the specification element belongs.
    String
    getName()
    Returns the unique internal name of the specification element.
    JTerm
    getOriginalInv()
    Returns the invariant formula without implicit all-quantification over the receiver object.
    Contract.OriginalVariables
    getOrigVars()
    Returns the original Self Variable to replace it easier.
    VisibilityModifier
    getVisibility()
    Returns the visibility of the invariant (null for default visibility)
    boolean
    isFree()
    Tells whether the invariant is free (i.e., can be assumed without proof).
    boolean
    isStatic()
    Tells whether the invariant is static (i.e., does not refer to a receiver object).
    ClassInvariant
    map(UnaryOperator<JTerm> op, Services services)
    Applies a unary operator to every term in this specification element.
    ClassInvariant
    setKJT(KeYJavaType newKjt)
    Returns another class invariant like this one, except that it refers to the passed KeYJavaType.
    String
    toString()

    clone, equals, finalize, getClass, hashCode, notify, notifyAll, wait, wait, wait

  • Constructor Details

    • ClassInvariantImpl

      public ClassInvariantImpl(String name, String displayName, KeYJavaType kjt, VisibilityModifier visibility, JTerm inv, LocationVariable selfVar)
      Creates a class invariant.
      Parameters:
      name - the unique internal name of the invariant
      displayName - the displayed name of the invariant
      kjt - the KeYJavaType to which the invariant belongs
      visibility - the visibility of the invariant (null for default visibility)
      inv - the invariant formula itself
      selfVar - the variable used for the receiver object

    • ClassInvariantImpl

      public ClassInvariantImpl(String name, String displayName, KeYJavaType kjt, VisibilityModifier visibility, JTerm inv, LocationVariable selfVar, boolean free)
      Creates a class invariant.
      Parameters:
      name - the unique internal name of the invariant
      displayName - the displayed name of the invariant
      kjt - the KeYJavaType to which the invariant belongs
      visibility - the visibility of the invariant (null for default visibility)
      inv - the invariant formula itself
      selfVar - the variable used for the receiver object
      free - whether this contract is free.

  • Method Details

    • map

      public ClassInvariant map(UnaryOperator<JTerm> op, Services services)
      Description copied from interface: SpecificationElement
      Applies a unary operator to every term in this specification element.
      Specified by:
      map in interface ClassInvariant
      Specified by:
      map in interface SpecificationElement
      Parameters:
      op - the operator to apply.
      services - services.
      Returns:
      this specification element with the operator applied.
